summary: Full validation of DevBroz site: contact API (happy path + 5 validations), MongoDB persistence, SEO (robots.txt/sitemap.xml/index.html meta), 404 page, footer social links, and service/partners page regression. All core functionality verified working against live Resend.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py L136: logger.error is referenced in submit_contact BEFORE logger is defined (logger is configured at L186-191 at module bottom). A DB write failure would raise NameError. Move the logging.basicConfig + logger=getLogger to the top of the file (before any route handler uses it). Low probability of triggering (only on Mongo write failure) but a latent bug.

backend/server.py L28: CONTACT_RECIPIENT default is 'enquiry@devbroz.com' but .env sets it to 'devbroz.info@gmail.com' (correct for Resend sandbox). Consider documenting this in comments so the default doesn't silently bypass sandbox once a different developer runs locally without the .env.

frontend ContactSection.js L180-186: handleClose does not abort an in-flight axios request. If user clicks backdrop while submitting, status transitions via setTimeout after success/error may fire on an unmounted/reset form. Consider passing an AbortController signal to axios or checking a mounted ref before setStatus calls.
test_credentials: None required. Used email=devbroz.info@gmail.com (Resend sandbox recipient) for happy path.
seed_data_creation: Test created 2 TEST-prefixed contact_submissions in MongoDB (email_status=sent, verified via Motor query). These are fine to leave or clean up via `db.contact_submissions.delete_many({'name': {'$regex': '^TEST'}})`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright's strict visibility check (wait_for_selector default) times out on this page because of heavy canvas/WebGL (particle hero + DotGrid modal canvas) — error shows 'locator resolved to visible' but the polling race trips. Use state='attached' plus a brief wait_for_timeout after domcontentloaded instead of relying on default visibility waits. The elements ARE visible in screenshots. Also note: closing the contact success modal leaves the success div in DOM briefly due to framer-motion AnimatePresence exit animation (~450ms) — query_selector will still find it; the UI is visually closed regardless.

verified_flows.contact_happy_path: POST /api/contact with valid payload returns {status:'sent', id:uuid}. MongoDB contact_submissions doc has email_status='sent' and email_id populated. UI shows Submit button transitioning 'Submit' -> 'Sending...' (with spinner) -> success block with 'Message on its way.', first-name greeting, user's email, Close button. 'Take me home' NOT present in success block (confirmed, that string lives on 404 page only).
verified_flows.contact_validation: Missing email, invalid email, empty name, empty details, details>4000 chars all return 422.
verified_flows.404_page: data-testid not-found-page, not-found-code='404', not-found-title contains 'out of scope', not-found-email-btn href='mailto:enquiry@devbroz.com', not-found-home-btn navigates to /, not-found-brand present.
verified_flows.seo: <title> contains 'DevBroz'; meta description mentions 'technology partner'; og:title, og:image, canonical, application/ld+json Organization schema all present in GET /.
verified_flows.robots_sitemap: /robots.txt 200 with 'Allow: /' and 'Sitemap:' directive. /sitemap.xml 200 with 7 <url> entries (/, 5 services, /partners).
verified_flows.footer_social: footer-social-instagram href=https://www.instagram.com/dev.broz/, footer-social-linkedin href=https://www.linkedin.com/company/devbroz/, footer-social-email href=mailto:enquiry@devbroz.com — all match spec.
verified_flows.regression: All 5 service pages (data-engineering, ai-ml, data-analytics, business-automation, custom-software) render with service-page-<slug> testid. /partners renders. Home hero, navbar, contact button all render (screenshot-verified).
